title: 08021_ITBench_Evaluating_AI_Agents_across_Diverse_Real-World_IT_Automation_Tasks
positive_examples: Enables AI-driven IT automation that is correct, safe, and fast.
Encourages mindsharing in the community and lowers the barrier to innovate in the IT domain.
negative_examples: Security risks from executing LM-generated code/commands on the system, such as 'kubectl delete node' and 'rm -rf asset/'.
Possibility of illegitimate evaluation datasets being used to inject malicious code.
Deployment of ITBench agents could lead to the production of malicious code and libraries.
